  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put">

<java version="1.8.0_121" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.xmlsplitter.cci.XMLSplitterInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1200</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>1</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>0</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>XMLSplitter</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>RADARO_CREATE_JOB_BY_EXTERNAL_ID_TEST__XMLSplitter1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="namespaceMap"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>ns2</string> 
     <string>http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>ns1</string> 
     <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operation"> 
    <string>Group</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="outputSchemaDefinition"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
     <void property="rootElementName"> 
      <string>Root</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="structure"> 
      <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns:fsoa=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response&quot;&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;SQL_CFG_1&quot;&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;fsoa:Radaro_Select&quot;/&gt;&#13;
         &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;id&quot; type=&quot;xsd:long&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
   &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Radaro_Select&quot;&gt;&#13;
               &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGTYPE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PU&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRAILER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRIP_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;BILL_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DETAIL_LINE_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE3&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE4&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE5&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGIN&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGNAME&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGCITY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTINATION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTNAME&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTCITY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PALLETS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WGTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PLTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_START&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_END&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;APPOINTMENT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;NOTE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_STATUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_TIMESTAMP&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_LAT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_LONG&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTEMAIL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGEMAIL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESCRIPTION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;LABELS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TMW_STATUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;EXTERNAL_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ADDED&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;BAR_CODE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_DESC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_UNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;LENGTH&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WIDTH&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;HEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT_UNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
               &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Root&quot;&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; ref=&quot;fsoa:Radaro_Select&quot;/&gt;&#13;
         &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
   &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
     </void>

     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void>

    <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="schemaDefinition"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
     <void property="rootElementName"> 
      <string>SQL_CFG_1</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="structure"> 
      <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response&quot;&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;SQL_CFG_1&quot;&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;Radaro_Select&quot;&gt;&#13;
               &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGTYPE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PU&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRAILER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRIP_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;

                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;

                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;

                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PALLETS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;

                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WGTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PLTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_START&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_END&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;

                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;HEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;

            &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
         &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;id&quot; type=&quot;xsd:long&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;

   &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string>

   <void property="selectPath"> 
    <string>/ns1:SQL_CFG_1/ns1:Radaro_Select</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="splitPath"> 
    <string>/ns1:SQL_CFG_1/ns1:Radaro_Select/ns1:MSGID</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="state"> 
    <int>6</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="targetNamespace"> 
    <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/XMLSplitter1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>Flow</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>outPort</string> 
    <string>OUT_PORT</string> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>inPort</string> 
    <string>IN_PORT</string> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>Splits the input XML on basis of XPATH provided</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>xmlsplitter.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.xmlsplitter.cci.XMLSplitterInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>XMLSplitter</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.InteractionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject></ConfigurationObjects><InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;

   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;SQL_CFG_1&quot;&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; name=&quot;Radaro_Select&quot;&gt;&#13;
               &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGTYPE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PU&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRAILER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRIP_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;BILL_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DETAIL_LINE_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;

                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE3&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE4&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE5&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGIN&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGNAME&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGCITY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTINATION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTNAME&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTCITY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PALLETS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WGTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PLTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_START&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_END&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;APPOINTMENT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;NOTE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_STATUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_TIMESTAMP&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_LAT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_LONG&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTEMAIL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGEMAIL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESCRIPTION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;LABELS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TMW_STATUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;EXTERNAL_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ADDED&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;BAR_CODE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_DESC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_UNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;LENGTH&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WIDTH&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;HEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT_UNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
               &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
         &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;id&quot; type=&quot;xsd:long&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
   &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>

<java version="1.8.0_121" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Root</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; xmlns:fsoa=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response&quot; elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1/Response&quot;&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;SQL_CFG_1&quot;&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;fsoa:Radaro_Select&quot;/&gt;&#13;
         &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:attribute name=&quot;id&quot; type=&quot;xsd:long&quot; use=&quot;optional&quot;/&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
   &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Radaro_Select&quot;&gt;&#13;
               &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;MSGTYPE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PU&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRAILER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TRIP_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;BILL_NUMBER&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DETAIL_LINE_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE3&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE4&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;REFERENCE5&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGIN&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGNAME&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGCITY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTINATION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTNAME&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR1&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTADDR2&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTCITY&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPROV&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTPHONEEXT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PALLETS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:int&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PCUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WGTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PLTUNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_START&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ARRIVE_END&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;APPOINTMENT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;NOTE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_DRIVER_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_STATUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_TIMESTAMP&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_LAT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_LONG&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;RADARO_ERROR_MESSAGE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESTEMAIL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ORIGEMAIL&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DESCRIPTION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ADDRESS_DESCRIPTION&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;LABELS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;TMW_STATUS&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;EXTERNAL_ID&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;ADDED&quot; type=&quot;xsd:dateTime&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;BAR_CODE&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_DESC&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_UNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;LENGTH&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WIDTH&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;HEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;DIM_WEIGHT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:double&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                     &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;WEIGHT_UNIT&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                  &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
               &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
   &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Root&quot;&gt;&#13;
      &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
         &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;1&quot; ref=&quot;fsoa:Radaro_Select&quot;/&gt;&#13;
         &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
      &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
   &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace">

  </void> 
 </object>

&lt;java version="1.8.0_121" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"&gt; 
 &lt;object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"&gt; 
  &lt;void property="rootElementName"&gt; 
   &lt;string&gt;Error&lt;/string&gt; 
  &lt;/void&gt; 
  &lt;void property="structure"&gt; 
   &lt;string&gt;&amp;lt;?xml version=&amp;quot;1.0&amp;quot; encoding=&amp;quot;UTF-8&amp;quot; ?&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&amp;quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&amp;quot; targetNamespace=&amp;quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&amp;quot; xmlns:tns=&amp;quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;xsd:element name=&amp;quot;Error&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
       &amp;lt;xsd:complexType&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;xsd:sequence&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;xsd:element name=&amp;quot;errorCode&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;xsd:string&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;xsd:element name=&amp;quot;errorMessage&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;xsd:string&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;xsd:element name=&amp;quot;errorDetail&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;xsd:string&amp;quot; minOccurs=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;
            &amp;lt;xsd:element name=&amp;quot;data&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;tns:data&amp;quot; minOccurs=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;
          &amp;lt;/xsd:sequence&amp;gt;
       &amp;lt;/xsd:complexType&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/xsd:element&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;xsd:complexType name=&amp;quot;data&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
	  &amp;lt;xsd:sequence&amp;gt;
         &amp;lt;xsd:any namespace=&amp;quot;##any&amp;quot; minOccurs=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; maxOccurs=&amp;quot;unbounded&amp;quot; processContents=&amp;quot;lax&amp;quot;/&amp;gt;
      &amp;lt;/xsd:sequence&amp;gt;
    &amp;lt;/xsd:complexType&amp;gt;
&amp;lt;/xsd:schema&amp;gt;&lt;/string&gt; 
  &lt;/void&gt; 
  &lt;void property="targetNamespace"&gt; 
   &lt;string&gt;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&lt;/string&gt; 
  &lt;/void&gt; 
 &lt;/object&gt; 
&lt;/java&gt; 
</FaultRecordDefinition></ESBAdapterConfigurations></string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>

class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.XErrorAction"> <void property="active"> <boolean>true</boolean> </void> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>11</int> </void> </object> </void> <void TrGatewayConfigurations.SchedulerConfigurations: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <java version="1.8.0_121" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.scheduler.SchedulerConfigurationInfo"> <void property="startDate"> <object class="java.util.Date"> <long>1604892140000</long> </object> </void> <void property="timeOffset"> <string>+00:00</string> </void> <void property="unit"> <string>seconds</string> </void> </object> </java>
